item.title: Cleveland Basements: Sump Pump On, Still Flooding?
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Even with your sump pump actively working, is your Cleveland basement still getting wet? There are common underlying issues that go beyond a simple pump failure. Watch now to uncover common causes and solutions.
item.content:encoded:
Even with your sump pump actively working, is your Cleveland basement still getting wet? There are common underlying issues that go beyond a simple pump failure. Watch now to uncover common causes and solutions.

Watch on Lakefront Leak & Drain

item.title: Cleveland Rain Alert: Protect Your Basement Now!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: With Cleveland experiencing heavy rains, it's crucial to check your basement for potential water issues. Our guide shows you exactly what to look for on your walls to prevent costly damage. Watch now for essential basement protection tips!
item.content:encoded:
With Cleveland experiencing heavy rains, it's crucial to check your basement for potential water issues. Our guide shows you exactly what to look for on your walls to prevent costly damage. Watch now for essential basement protection tips!

item.title: Cleveland: Prevent Laundry Room Flood Disasters at Home!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Laundry room floods can cause significant damage to Cleveland homes. Learn simple, effective steps to prevent these costly disasters. Watch this video to protect your home today!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland: Don't Wait! Know Your Home's Main Water Shut-Off.
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: A burst pipe or leak can cause major damage if you don't act fast. This video will show Cleveland homeowners exactly where to find their main water shut-off valve. Watch now to protect your Cleveland home!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland: Is Your Toilet Secretly Leaking Water?
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Hidden toilet leaks can silently waste hundreds of gallons of water, significantly increasing your utility bills. Discover easy ways to check your Cleveland home's toilet and fix common leaks yourself. Watch now to save money!
item.content:encoded:
Hidden toilet leaks can silently waste hundreds of gallons of water, significantly increasing your utility bills. Discover easy ways to check your Cleveland home's toilet and fix common leaks yourself. Watch now to save money!

item.title: Cleveland Homeowners: Tree Roots Threatening Your Sewer Line?
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Invasive tree roots can cause significant and expensive damage to your sewer system. Learn the critical signs of an attack and how to protect your home. Watch our video for essential insights and prevention tips.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Freeze Alert: Protect Your Outdoor Pipes!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: A surprising late freeze is hitting Cleveland, threatening exposed plumbing. Learn essential steps now to prevent costly pipe bursts and water damage. Watch now for vital pipe protection tips!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland: Leaky Outdoor Spigot? Spring Check Crucial!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: A dripping outdoor spigot can lead to costly water bills and potential foundation damage. Don't let a small leak turn into a major problem for your Cleveland home. Watch our video for quick spring check guidance.

item.title: Cleveland Homeowners: Stop Yard Flooding Now!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Is your Cleveland yard constantly waterlogged after rain? Learn how effective yard drainage systems can protect your home and landscape. Watch now to protect your Cleveland property!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Gutters: The Hidden Threat to Your Foundation
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Ignoring your gutters can lead to serious foundation problems for your Cleveland home. Water pooling around your foundation causes costly and preventable damage. Learn how to protect your Cleveland foundation.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Storms: Your Sump Pump Needs a Battery Backup!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland often sees heavy rain and high winds, which can lead to power outages. A reliable sump pump battery backup ensures your basement stays dry even when the power goes out. Watch now to protect your Cleveland home from flooding.
item.content:encoded:
Cleveland often sees heavy rain and high winds, which can lead to power outages. A reliable sump pump battery backup ensures your basement stays dry even when the power goes out. Watch now to protect your Cleveland home from flooding.

item.title: Cleveland Spring: Stop Costly Sewer Root Invasion in Your Home!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: As Cleveland springs to life, growing tree roots can aggressively seek water, often invading your home's sewer lines. This video offers crucial advice to help homeowners prevent expensive and messy plumbing disasters. Learn how to protect your property now!
item.content:encoded:
